briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX PIO peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX TMR peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX Timing Detector (TIMDET) peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX DDC peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX AUX peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX AUD peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX Link Status (LNKSTA) peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx core instance.

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for the HDMI RX driver.

detaileddescription.para: This handler reads the pending interrupt from PIO, DDC, TIMDET, AUX, AUD and LNKSTA peripherals, determines the source of the interrupts, clears the interrupts and calls callbacks accordingly.

The application is responsible for connecting this function to the interrupt system. Application beyond this driver is also responsible for providing callbacks to handle interrupts and installing the callbacks using XV_HdmiRx_SetCallback() during initialization phase. An example delivered with this driver demonstrates how this could be done.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_HdmiRx instance that just interrupted.

briefdescription.para: This function installs an asynchronous callback function for the given HandlerType:

para.preformatted: HandlerType Callback Function Type ------------------------- ----------------------------------------------- (XV_HDMIRX_HANDLER_VTD) VtdCallback (XV_HDMIRX_HANDLER_AUX) AuxCallback (XV_HDMIRX_HANDLER_AUD) AudCallback (XV_HDMIRX_HANDLER_LNKSTA) LnkStaCallback (XV_HDMIRX_HANDLER_PIO) PioCallback

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDMI RX core instance.
is the address of the callback function.
is a user data item that will be passed to the callback function when it is invoked.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if callback function installed successfully.

simplesect.para: Invoking this function for a handler that already has been installed replaces it with the new handler.

briefdescription.para: This file contains interrupt related functions for Xilinx HDMI RX core.

detaileddescription.para: Please see xv_hdmirx.h for more details of the driver.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 gm, mg 11/03/15 Initial release. 1.01 yh 14/01/16 Set AxisEnable PIO to high when RX stream locked 1.03 MG 18/02/16 Added Link Check callback 1.04 MG 08/03/16 Added pixel clock calculation to HdmiRx_TmrIntrHandler 1.05 MH 08/03/16 Added support for read not complete DDC event 1.06 MG 27/05/16 Updated HdmiRx_VtdIntrHandler 1.07 MG 27/05/16 Updated HdmiRx_TmrIntrHandler 1.08 MG 30/05/16 Fixed issue with pixel clock adjustment for YUV422 colorspace 1.09 MH 26/07/16 Added DDC HDCP protocol event. 1.10 YH 18/08/16 squash unused variable compiler warning 1.11 MG 03/03/17 Updated function HdmiRx_TmrIntrHandler with GetVideoPropertiesTries 1.12 YH 22/08/17 Update AudFormat when servicing Aud Interrupt 1.13 MH 31/08/17 Update Reset sequence for Video_Bridge 2.00 EB 16/01/18 Added clearing of XV_HDMIRX_AUX_STA_GCP_CD_EVT flag after servicing it YH 16/11/17 Added bridge overflow interrupt 16/11/17 Update Reset sequence with dedicated reset for each clock domain MMO 08/02/18 Adding proper handling for Sync Loss/Sync Recover 2.10 YH 13/04/18 Fixed a bug in PioIntrHandler 2.20 EB 16/08/18 Replaced TIME_10MS, TIME_16MS, TIME_200MS with XV_HdmiRx_GetTime10Ms, XV_HdmiRx_GetTime16Ms XV_HdmiRx_GetTime200Ms Added TMDS Clock Ratio callback support YB 15/08/18 Added new cases for HDCP 1.4 & 2.2 protocol events in XV_HdmiRx_SetCallback function. Updated the HdmiRx_DdcIntrHandler() function.
